win: Pushed to production alone and nothing broke.
overcame: A failing CI pipeline and zero teammates online at 2am.

win: Pitched to a room of 50 and landed the laughs.
overcame: Stage fright that usually freezes me up.

win: Finished the attention paper end to end, actually got it.
overcame: Three re-reads and a lot of pausing to Google.

win: Tracked down the heisenbug and made it reproducible.
overcame: Two days of "works on my machine".

win: Ran the whole thing without stopping.
overcame: A side stitch at km 3 and the urge to quit.

win: Two months on the same budget and it held.
overcame: My habit of forgetting to log small spends.

win: Got real-time messages flowing both ways.
overcame: Three hours lost to a CORS wall.

win: Walked out of the final actually confident.
overcame: Eigenvalues that never clicked until week 9.

win: Sent the scary email and she said yes.
overcame: The voice telling me not to bother her.

win: Finished a small landscape I actually like.
overcame: The urge to overwork every wash.

win: Asked for the number and got it.
overcame: A decade of avoiding the money talk.

win: Taught 20 students and they got it.
overcame: Imposter syndrome the whole walk over.

win: Refactored class components to hooks, cleanly.
overcame: A mental model that fought me for a week.

win: Can play three songs start to finish now.
overcame: Finger cramps and a stubborn F chord.
